Compliance.description: PSIRA registered Reg#765528 since 2001, certificate valid (shown on site despite old date). Competition Commission approvals for 2025 acquisitions. No major regulatory issues found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter ADT Security 2.8/5, Fidelity Security 2.3/5. Negative forum sentiments on service/response. Employee reviews 3.5/5 Indeed. Low satisfaction.

Product Value.description: Comprehensive range, competitive pricing vs market, but value questioned in poor reviews. Transparent via site/partners.

Innovation.description: SecureHome app for arm/disarm/CCTV/notifications, FindU panic app (R49/m), VumaCam partnership (18k cams), SecureFire launch June 2025. Tech adoption good.

Customer Support.description: Lines (0861 212 300), but reviews cite slow/ineffective support, billing hassles.

Accessibility & Security.description: Apps available for remote access (SecureHome, FindU), no data collection per privacy policy, no POPIA violations found. Digital access good but app bugs noted.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Armed response from ~R400-R1000/mo (market avg R700), partner ex R364/mo

appRatings.googlePlay: N/A (FidelitySecure low downloads, no rating shown)

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed-negative customer reviews on forums/HelloPeter (response/service), positive news on expansions.
